chain.thought: Explanation: Interpreting “the last to be done” as the most recently opened stadium, the latest year in the "opened" column is 2013, which corresponds to Allianz Riviera. Therefore, Allianz Riviera was the last to be opened.

judge_thought: Explanation: The phrase "last to be done" most reasonably refers to the most recently opened stadium, using the "opened" column. Scanning the years, the latest is 2013 for Allianz Riviera (row 9). All other stadiums have earlier opening years (e.g., 2012, 2011, 2008, etc.). Therefore, the last to be opened is Allianz Riviera, matching the Prediction Answer.
